description: THREE Decline of Press Under Fascism Is Disclosed at Exhibit SHOWS SPIRIT OF SOCIALISM WILL LIVE ON Cemetery Exhibit Displays Suppres sed Newspapers Leader Special Service COLOGNEThe Pressa or Inter national press exhibition here which is devoted to showing the progress of the press in modern democracies contains one interesting exhibit which shows the opposite of prog ress the decline of the press under Italian Fascism This exhibit is sponsored by the headquarters of the Cologne Social ist party in collaboration with Ital ian Socialist exiles living in Paris It was opened on June 10 the anni versary of the murder of Giacomo Matteolti Surveys Fascist Record There are 62 individual exhibits in this section divided into three departments The first department exhibits a list and portraits of the antiFascists put away by Fascist murderers hoodlums police etc Full details are given of the ways in which men like Matteotti Amen dola Gobetti Gen Bencivenga and others were killed or driven to their death The second department is called The Cemetery It shows the sup pressed papers of all kinds from radical working class to conserva tive capitalist democratic and Cath olic which opposed Fascism and were destroyed The third
